entity.title: md:is_suspiciously_successive_range
entity.description: Determine if two Unicode range seen next to each other can be considered as suspicious.

neighbors.description: alpha_unicode_split may call is_suspiciously_successive_range (syntax only, imported name match) (ast import hint: md.is_suspiciously_successive_range)
alpha_unicode_split may call is_suspiciously_successive_range (syntax only, imported name match) (ast import hint: md.is_suspiciously_successive_range)
SuspiciousRange.feed_info may call is_suspiciously_successive_range (syntax only, local name match)

text_units.text:
def feed_info(self, character: str, info: CharInfo) -> None:
        """Optimized feed using pre-computed character info."""
        self._character_count += 1

        if info.space or info.punct or character in COMMON_SAFE_ASCII_CHARACTERS:
            self._last_printable_seen = None
            self._last_printable_range = None
            return

        if self._last_printable_seen is None:
            self._last_printable_seen = character
            self._last_printable_range = unicode_range(character)
            return

        unicode_range_a: str | None = self._last_printable_range
        unicode_range_b: str | None = unicode_range(character)

        if is_suspiciously_successive_range(unicode_range_a, unicode_range_b):
            self._suspicious_successive_range_count += 1

        self._last_printable_seen = character
        self._last_printable_range = unicode_range_b
